desc: Designed and supported data integration workflows using Azure Data Factory and Azure Data Lake Storage, aligning technical solutions with business needs. Focused on improving data availability and reliability across systems.
Optimized SQL queries in Azure Databricks and automated operational tasks using Python and Azure Automation to improve system performance and efficiency.

Developed and maintained Power BI dashboards to support business decision-making and translate requirements into reporting solutions. Collaborated with users to understand needs and deliver functional insights.
Managed Azure user access and contributed to process improvements by optimizing data workflows and automating tasks using Python, enhancing operational efficiency.
Supported business analysis by developing Power BI reports and gathering requirements for data-driven solutions. Ensured information was structured and accessible for decision-making.
Worked on ETL processes using SSIS and Azure Data Factory, while optimizing SQL queries and automating repetitive tasks with Python to improve efficiency.
Developed dashboards in Power BI and Looker Studio to support business decision-making. Built ETL processes using Pentaho Data Integration.
Wrote SQL queries in SQL Server and Oracle and performed data analysis using Excel to support reporting and operational needs.
